Career History

Work Experience

⭐ Flagship Project
Network Infrastructure Technician
2024 – 2025
SARB Project — Datacentrix / WBHO (South African Reserve Bank)
  • Deployed network infrastructure from scratch at South Africa's Reserve Bank — one of the country's most security-sensitive facilities.
  • Personally tested 5,000+ network points using Softing testers to ensure compliance and performance standards.
  • Terminated and remediated 3,000+ network connections after identifying faults and failures.
  • Built and configured network cabinets; coordinated with Bidvest to integrate camera systems with network infrastructure.
Tier 2–3 IT Support Technician
Jan 2021 – Sep 2025
Datacentrix (MSP) — Pretoria, Gauteng
  • Served as senior escalation technician for 50+ diverse client accounts with a 95% first-time resolution rate.
  • Installed, configured, and maintained 30+ servers, firewalls, and cloud services across multiple client environments.
  • Administered Windows Server environments and managed user identities via Microsoft Active Directory.
  • Mentored 3 junior technicians on technical procedures and escalation management.
  • Provided advanced on-site and remote support in a fast-paced MSP environment.
Junior Data Analyst
Jan 2025 – Apr 2026
Online / Remote
  • Collected, cleaned, and organised sales data using Excel and Google Sheets to ensure accuracy and consistency for reporting.
  • Wrote SQL queries to extract and manipulate data from relational databases for business analysis purposes.
  • Built interactive dashboards and visualisations using Power BI and Tableau to communicate sales trends to stakeholders.
  • Used Python (pandas) to automate data cleaning tasks and perform exploratory data analysis on sales datasets.
Cybersecurity Defender (Practical)
2025 – 2026
Northern Technical College — Online Practicals
  • Monitored network traffic and security events to identify and respond to potential cyber threats in real time.
  • Performed incident response tasks including identifying, containing, and documenting security incidents.
  • Conducted penetration testing exercises to identify vulnerabilities in systems and networks.
  • Applied skills from Cisco Endpoint Security and Network Defense certifications in practical lab environments.
